introSection: Mad Racers, previously reported as Anger of Yeti, is a wooden roller coaster currently under construction at Fantasy Valley in Xiangzhou, Xiangyang, Hubei, China. It is being built by Great Coasters International and was designed by Skyline Attractions subsidiary Skyline Design. The attraction will be the first wooden roller coaster with a steel support structure in China.
fullText: Mad Racers, previously reported as Anger of Yeti, is a wooden roller coaster currently under construction at Fantasy Valley in Xiangzhou, Xiangyang, Hubei, China. It is being built by Great Coasters International and was designed by Skyline Attractions subsidiary Skyline Design. The attraction will be the first wooden roller coaster with a steel support structure in China.
